_comment: Per-recipe alternative recipe URLs — surfaced in the modal under the primary URL. Useful for showing a cheaper / different-protein / different-method version of the same dish without giving it its own card. Keyed by recipe id.

american-impossible-meatloaf.note: Cheaper, lentil-and-chickpea-based alternative — drop the Impossible Beef and use the same ketchup-glaze finish.
